task_description: Add all providers from OmniRoute to AxonRouter without removing existing ones, reorganize into efficient categories (LOCAL_PROVIDERS, SEARCH_PROVIDERS, AUDIO_ONLY_PROVIDERS, etc), add proper TypeScript types and helper functions, and update the dashboard UX to display providers in clean categorized sections like OmniRoute's /provider page.

verification.summary: TypeScript typecheck (0 errors), 1056 tests passed (188 files), production build successful. Semantic review completed and all identified issues resolved. Pioneer AI provider added with auto-cooldown documentation comment.
